content: Review the generated EmailVerificationWaitService (T48). Check: (1) ISchedulerService.scheduleDelayed() used — no direct Bull import? (2) Token TTL read from FREEDOM config — not hardcoded? (3) ResendVerificationRequested is idempotent via IScopedMemoryService.setIfAbsent()? (4) ChangeEmailRequested revokes existing token via storeDocument() BEFORE creating replacement? (5) Expired tokens rejected — not silently accepted? (6) SLA surfaced via FlowStateSnapshot.remainingMs? Flag any violation as BUILD_FAILURE.
